When Jazmine Light saw paparazzi photos of Travis Kelce with a fluffy white, cloud-on-four-legs Samoyed like the dogs she breeds, it told her something about the Kansas City Chiefs player himself.
“If it is Kelce’s dog, it just tells you his personality,” said Light, the vice president of the Heart of America Samoyed Club, which serves dog owners in Western Missouri and Eastern Kansas.
Paparazzi photos that first emerged in April shone a spotlight on a breed developed by the nomadic Samoyed people of Siberia.
At the Westminster Kennel Club dog show, the Samoyed competes in the working group.
“Did you see that Taylor Swift has a Sammy?” they excitedly told her.
“I said I love that they have a Sammy,” said Light, a Missouri breeder for 24 years who has relocated to central Florida.
Depending on the dog’s lineage, genetic health testing and the location of the breeder, a Samoyed puppy can cost $3,000 to $5,000, Light said.
Swifties have joked that Swift — not known as a dog person — adopted a dog that’s really a cat.
Light uses the promise of a car ride to get her dogs back when they take off."},{"url":"https://www.palmbeachpost.com/story/entertainment/2026/07/14/taylor-swift-new-dog-travis-kelce-landed-florida-trump-airport/90911962007/","title":"Newlyweds Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce land at newly named Trump airport","content":"3 days ago — The photos show Kelce gathering luggage and walking a fluffy poodle-like white dog. This isn't the first time the couple was spotted in South Florida, though.
Before announcing her 12th album on Kelce's podcast "New Heights," Swift talked about her 2025 summer vacation in Florida with Kelce.
The pair stayed in a multimillion-dollar mansion in Boca Raton from April to July 2025.
According to reports from Page Six and TMZ, the superstar couple made a stop in Palm Beach, Florida, over the weekend.
Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce tied the knot just shy of a year after getting engaged in August 2025.
They were married at Madison Square Garden.
Comedian and actor Adam Sandler officiated the wedding, with the newlyweds' reps saying he is a "close friend."
